title: Map of all connected boards

posts.author: SophieCaines (Sophie Caines)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone know of a way to see an overview of all board connections in Monday.com either through columns or automations?

Use case
I have board A that is connected to board B with a connect boards column and a mirror column. I also have board C which is connected to board A through an automation (when something happens on board A, it creates an item in board C)

Is there anywhere that would show me board A is connected to board B and board C?

Issue
I’ve been stung a few times where I’ll make a change to a board and have lost track of what other boards are connected, and then sometimes maybe lose information because I haven’t updated an automation somewhere

Thanks!

posts.author: Butterfly23 (Michele Pack)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue lots of board connections but no visual as to which ones so that all my automations work and i dont lose information when doing any changes.
